core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix futuristic interfaces with premium glassmorphism to elevate the SaaS experience.
Emotion First: The dark void paired with neon gradients creates a sense of cutting-edge technology and limitless power.
Negative Space: Use large gaps and breathing room to make complex AI tools look simple and accessible.
Contrast: Deepest black backgrounds with glowing cyan and fuchsia accents.

headings.description: Futuristic, clean geometric sans for distinct and powerful headings.

body.description: Clean, highly legible humanist sans for dense dashboard data.

mono.description: Used for code outputs and API keys.

layout_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but doubled for containers (e.g., p-8 instead of p-4).
layout_spacing.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout_spacing.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl hidden md:flex flex-col h-screen fixed top-0 left-0 z-40
layout_spacing.drawer_mobile: Use Shadcn Sheet component for mobile sidebar navigation, opening from left.

glassmorphism.usage: Use for Cards, Modal Overlays, Navbars, and Dropdowns.

solid_dark.usage: Use for deeper background layers, sidebars, or nested content areas.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-500 to-fuchsia-500 text-white font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(236,72,153,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all rounded-lg px-6 py-3
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-all

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 text-white placeholder-zinc-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500 focus:border-transparent rounded-lg px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all

cards.tool_card: flex flex-col p-6 rounded-2xl bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl hover:bg-white/[0.06] hover:border-cyan-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.2)] transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer

motion.page_transition: Fade in and slide up slightly (opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 10 -> 0) duration 0.4s ease-out.
motion.list_stagger: Stagger children entrance by 0.1s for AI tool grids.
motion.hover_effects: Transform scale-105 or translate-y-1, with glow expansion.
motion.libraries: Framer Motion for animations, Lucide React for standard icons.

hero_background.description: Tech grid background with subtle cyan lighting, perfect for the hero section or authentication background with a dark overlay.

ai_brain_concept.description: Holographic glowing AI brain, ideal for the 'AI Power Lab' welcome screen, empty states, or AI generation loading screens.

abstract_neon_1.description: Abstract blue and purple light streaks. Good for background headers or subscription plan highlight cards.

icons_and_assets.style: Clean, scalable stroke-based icons. Use cyan or fuchsia stroke colors for active states.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over gradients uses text-shadow or a dark overlay underneath for legibility.
accessibility.focus_states: All focusable elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-cyan-500 ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#050505].
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use `framer-motion` for all micro-interactions and route transitions.
Use Shadcn UI extensively for the SaaS components (DropdownMenu, Dialog, Select, Tabs, Sheet, Avatar, etc.), but strip their default borders/backgrounds to use the glassmorphism rules specified here.
Ensure the layout is truly mobile-first. The sidebar must be hidden on mobile and accessible via a hamburger menu opening a Shadcn `Sheet` component.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or #808080. The background is `#050505` (tinted very slightly).
Use the provided image URLs. Do NOT use placeholder image URLs like dummyimage.com or via.placeholder.com.
For the 50+ AI tools grid, use a dense Bento Grid (`gap-4` or `gap-6`) with glassmorphic cards.
